holdings.infoBox: USCL is an equity ETF with a total of 408 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.11%, Apple at 8.22%, Microsoft at 5.30%, Amazon.com at 4.44%, and Alphabet at 4.03%.

overview.description: The iShares Climate Conscious & Transition MSCI USA ETF (USCL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Extended Climate Action index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap US companies selected as leaders in their respective GICS sectors in managing the transition to a low carbon economy, as determined by MSCI. USCL was launched on Jun 6, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Extended Climate Action Index
